In the media 13 March 2025 Luke Charters MP and government minister in First York talks York Press A MEETING is being set up with a government minister in Westminster to discuss controversial changes to child bus tickets in York. ... 13 March 2025 Keir Starmer congratulates Luke Charters MP on baby news York Press THE Prime Minister has sent his best wishes to a York MP and his wife after it was revealed they are expecting a second child. ... 13 March 2025 Luke Charters meets King and Queen at Buckingham Palace York Press A YORK MP was one of a select group invited to meet the King and Queen at Buckingham Palace. ... 13 March 2025 MP Luke Charters in Hartrigg Oaks New Earswick flood victory York Press RESIDENTS at a retirement complex in York are celebrating after claiming victory in a long-standing battle over flooding. ... 13 March 2025 Horrified MPs told bailiffs made disabled man ‘feel like waste of a life’ The Mirror Victims Minister Alex Davies-Jones said the Government is considering new laws governing bailiffs after being told of ‘harrowing’ cases of abuse ...
